prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.7 kg; Height 166.2 cm; BMI 28.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 200mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 206mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 79.7kg; 6 months ago 78.2kg; 3 months ago 76.9kg; current 78.7kg), Height (12 months ago 166.2cm; 9 months ago 166.2cm; 6 months ago 166.2cm; 3 months ago 166.2cm; current 166.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 114mg/g; 9 months ago 94mg/g; 6 months ago 96mg/g; 3 months ago 103mg/g; current 135mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 150mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
